历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for the science group were 2905 → 1908 → 3578 → 2369 → 4699, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (increasing rank numbers). In 2025, the worst_rank for the Physics Category reached 4699, a significant drop of about 2330 positions compared to 2024, mainly due to the impact of new college entrance examination subject grouping (Physics + Chemistry / Physics + No Restrictions / Physics + Ideology and Politics), with the lowest ranking (4699) in the group requiring Physics with no additional subject restrictions. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Yunnan: 38 in 2021, 38 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 31 in 2024, and 29 in 2025 (Physics Category); the 2026 Physics Category plan is 28, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 3.4%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked 19th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities in China, with strong basic science disciplines. 4. [Reputation Heat] The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin heat ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive heat of 1.27 million; regarding historical admission anomalies, there was a significant drop in admission rankings in Jiangxi in 2022, but no obvious signal of admission gaps in recent years; science-related A- and above disciplines include Mathematics A, Statistics A, Physics A-, Chemistry A-, Geography A+, Ecology A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Systems Science A-, Psychology A+, etc., with a wide coverage and outstanding strength, strongly attracting science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity (all were highly recommended or recommended in 2024), but Beijing Normal University focuses on basic sciences and teacher training, with limited engineering scale; the total number of candidates in Yunnan Province in 2026 is 377,900, an increase of about 32.3% from 285,688 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. 7. [Regional Factors] Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, belonging to cross-province enrollment, with a science group enrollment scale of about 28–38 in Yunnan, showing a slight decreasing trend in recent years, with no local regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4699, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (29→28) which pushes the ranking upward, the significant increase in total candidates in Yunnan Province (+32%) intensifying competition, and the sustained appeal of the university's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines, it is expected that the lowest admission ranking for the science group in 2026 will slightly move forward (decrease in rank number) compared to 2025. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 4682, with a range of 4182–5182.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4182–5182, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 4100), focus on aiming for the Liyun Experimental Class and popular majors like Mathematics and Computer Science; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 5100), choose Tier 3 majors as a safe option, and pay attention to the restrictions of different subject requirements (Chemistry/No Restrictions/Ideology and Politics) in the Physics Category on available majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group were 185, 184, 556, 177, and 259 respectively. In 2023, due to a 45-point drop from 575 in 2022, the ranking abnormally shifted to 556, but quickly rebounded to 177 in 2024. Under the new Gaokao history category in 2025, it rose to 259, showing a slight backward trend in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 259. The enrollment plan for Yunnan liberal arts group: 15 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 12 in 2025 (history category). In 2026, the history category plan is 13, an increase of 1 from 2025, a small expansion of about 8.3%, which slightly eases competition but with limited effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 19th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, making it a top national comprehensive normal university with an extremely high academic level. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management response incidents (clarifying online rumors), with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 37th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of 1.27 million, indicating high attention among normal universities. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there was a significant drop in admission rankings in Jiangxi in 2022, but no obvious signal of admission gaps in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 18 disciplines rated A- or above, including Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Geography A+, and Marxist Theory A+, demonstrating extremely strong academic strength and strong appeal to liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
The social popularity of normal/education majors showed a divided and wait-and-see trend from 2023 to 2024, but as the highest institution for normal education, Beijing Normal University's flagship majors such as Chinese Language and Literature and History remain consistently popular. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Yunnan Province is 377,900, an increase of about 32.3% from 285,688 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, a cross-province enrollment, with a small enrollment scale in Yunnan liberal arts group (about 10-15 people), and no special regional preference advantage locally.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 259, the slight downward effect on rankings due to the small expansion in 2026 (12 to 13), the intensified competition from the significant increase in total examinees in Yunnan (+32%), and the sustained appeal of the school's top tier and advantageous disciplines, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the liberal arts group in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 287, with a range of 252-322.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 252-322, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 250), focus on aiming for the Liyun Experimental Class and the flagship Chinese Language and Literature major. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 320), choose Tier 3 majors as a stable option.
